channel.title: Waking Up on PostDoc Problems
channel.description: Recent content in Waking Up on PostDoc Problems

item.title: Saying No
item.description: In a podcast episode on waking up, Oliver Burkeman talks about the necessity to say no to certain things in life because you only have a finite amount of time. This becomes clear when you do the calculation involving the time available and the time required to get things done. This is further emphasized by the fact that we don’t always have the will, energy, or capacity to do the things we would like to do.
